ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* ISO country code */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* ISO currency code for the country */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Name of the capital city */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gdp_data" (
  "gdp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each GDP record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the GDP record */,
  "gdp_value" REAL /* GDP value for the year */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita for the year */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gdp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gdp_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gdp_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_data" (
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the population record */,
  "population_value" REAL /* Population value for the year */,
  "urban_population" REAL /* Urban population value for the year */,
  "rural_population" REAL /* Rural population value for the year */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("population_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the economic indicator (e.g., inflation rate) */,
  "indicator_value" REAL /* Value of the economic indicator */,
  "indicator_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the indicator */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the geographical region */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* ISO region code */,
  "region_description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "country_regions" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Year the country was first associated with the region */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* Year the country was last associated with the region (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_regions_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_regions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data that changed (GDP, population, indicator) */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the change */,
  "previous_value" REAL /* Previous value before the change */,
  "new_value" REAL /* New value after the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was recorded */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "report_year" INTEGER /* Year the report was published */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "report_link" TEXT /* Link to the online version of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., annual, quarterly) */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords for search and categorization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_reports_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_reports_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last user login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the data */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_link" TEXT /* Link to the source of the data */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the data source was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "country_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., Human Development Index) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the metric was reported */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_metrics_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_metrics_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "country_statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the statistic */,
  "statistic_name" TEXT /* Name of the statistic (e.g., unemployment rate) */,
  "statistic_value" REAL /* Value of the statistic */,
  "statistic_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the statistic */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_statistics_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_statistics_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)
